title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Ergo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at HDFC Ergo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Risk Analyst with drive and ambition, HDFC Ergo in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About HDFC Ergo:
HDFC Ergo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Ergo!
